record.field:
import random
# Configuración CENTRAL_RANGE = (50, 500) DELEGACION_RANGE = (0, 50) ZERO_PROB = 0.3
# Buscar productos con variantes templates = env['product.template'].search([ ('product_variant_count', '>', 1), ('detailed_type', '=', 'product') ])
# Buscar ubicaciones locations = env['stock.location'].search([ ('usage', '=', 'internal'), ('company_id', '=', env.company.id) ])
# Identificar central central = locations.filtered(lambda l: 'central' in l.name.lower()) central = central[0] if central else locations[0] delegaciones = locations - central
# Generar stock count = 0 for template in templates: for variant in template.product_variant_ids:
# Central if random.random() > ZERO_PROB: qty = random.randint(*CENTRAL_RANGE) env['stock.quant'].create({ 'product_id': variant.id, 'location_id': central.id, 'quantity': qty, 'reserved_quantity': 0, }) count += 1
# Delegaciones for delegacion in delegaciones: if random.random() > ZERO_PROB: qty = random.randint(*DELEGACION_RANGE) env['stock.quant'].create({ 'product_id': variant.id, 'location_id': delegacion.id, 'quantity': qty, 'reserved_quantity': 0, }) count += 1
# Mostrar resultado action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Stock Demo Generado', 'message': f'{count} quants creados', 'type': 'success', } }
